move.notallowed: This module type is not allowed here
create.error.required: These required fields must be listed under create.fields (or made optional): {{ fields }}
create.error.fields: These fields are listed under create.fields but the dialog can't show them (reserved name, unsupported type, or unknown field): {{ fields }}
create.error.title: Modules don't support create.title. Use the blueprint's `label` option to label modules by their content.
missingTemplate.info: The blueprint for this module type no longer exists. Change the type or delete the module.
deleteAll.confirm: Do you really want to delete all modules?
lock.applyFailed: Some modules couldn't be saved because another user is editing them. The list has been refreshed.
license.info: Don't have a licence key yet? Buy a licence
license.key.help: Enter the licence key you received after purchase.
license.error.invalid: Invalid licence key. Please check and try again.
license.active.info: Thank you! Your support means a lot ♥
license.remove.text: This will remove the licence from this site. You can re-activate it at any time with the same key.
